requirement_topic.en: EMAE Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz Isolated Island Grid and Donor-Programme Technical Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMAE BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz孤岛电网及捐助方项目技术要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMAE BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz孤島電網及捐助方項目技術要求

summary.en: EMAE (Empresa de Água e Electricidade) is the sole electricity utility in São Tomé and Príncipe, responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution on both São Tomé island and Príncipe island. The grid operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz — single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V — aligned with the IEC/European convention inherited from the Portuguese colonial legacy. São Tomé has no independent national grid code equivalent to those of larger national regulators; grid-connection technical requirements for BESS projects are defined through EMAE project agreements and donor-programme (World Bank, AfDB, EU) technical specifications. The grid is small, isolated, and heavily diesel-dependent, with significant frequency instability; BESS projects are primarily solar-plus-storage aimed at diesel displacement and grid stabilisation. No publicly accessible EMAE technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — exporters must engage EMAE and the relevant donor programme at the earliest project stage. IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards are expected to be referenced in donor-funded project specifications as the technical baseline for BESS system performance and safety.
summary.zh: EMAE（水电公司）是圣多美和普林西比唯一的电力公用事业单位，负责圣多美岛和普林西比岛的发电、输电和配电。电网运行于230/400 V 50 Hz——单相230 V、三相400 V——延续自葡萄牙殖民遗产的IEC/欧洲惯例。圣多美无与大型国家监管机构相当的独立国家电网规范；BESS项目的并网技术要求通过EMAE项目协议及捐助方（世界银行、非洲开发银行、欧盟）技术规格确定。该电网规模小、孤立，高度依赖柴油，频率稳定性差；BESS项目主要为光伏储能，旨在替代柴油并稳定电网。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认EMAE公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件——出口商须在项目最早阶段与EMAE及相关捐助方计划接触。IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准预计将在捐助方资助项目规格中作为BESS系统性能和安全的技术基准被引用。
summary.zht: EMAE（水電公司）是聖多美和普林西比唯一的電力公用事業單位，負責聖多美島和普林西比島的發電、輸電和配電。電網運行於230/400 V 50 Hz——單相230 V、三相400 V——延續自葡萄牙殖民遺產的IEC/歐洲慣例。聖多美無與大型國家監管機構相當的獨立國家電網規範；BESS項目的併網技術要求通過EMAE項目協議及捐助方（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、歐盟）技術規格確定。該電網規模小、孤立，高度依賴柴油，頻率穩定性差；BESS項目主要為光伏儲能，旨在替代柴油並穩定電網。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認EMAE公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件——出口商須在項目最早階段與EMAE及相關捐助方計畫接觸。IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準預計將在捐助方資助項目規格中作為BESS系統性能和安全的技術基準被引用。

standards_or_laws: EMAE (Empresa de Água e Electricidade) — sole grid operator and distribution utility for São Tomé and Príncipe; grid-connection approval required for all BESS installations
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected donor-programme project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected donor-programme project-specification reference)
São Tomé and Príncipe grid parameters: 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz (IEC/European convention)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter/bidirectional inverter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016. Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). Critically, São Tomé's grid is 230/400 V — both markets are 50 Hz but the voltage levels differ. PCS firmware, protection thresholds, and ride-through settings configured for China's 220/380 V must be re-parameterised and retested for São Tomé's 230/400 V grid before commissioning. Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not accepted as substitutes for EMAE or donor-programme requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS/双向逆变器）依据NB/T 42090-2016进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行于50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。关键点：圣多美电网为230/400 V——两个市场均为50 Hz但电压不同。针对中国220/380 V配置的PCS固件、保护阈值和穿越参数，须在调试前重新针对圣多美230/400 V电网条件进行参数配置和重新测试。中国GB/T并网证书和NEA审批不被接受为EMAE或捐助方计划要求的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS/雙向逆變器）依據NB/T 42090-2016進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行於50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。關鍵點：聖多美電網為230/400 V——兩個市場均為50 Hz但電壓不同。針對中國220/380 V配置的PCS韌體、保護閾值和穿越參數，須在調試前重新針對聖多美230/400 V電網條件進行參數配置和重新測試。中國GB/T併網證書和NEA審批不被接受為EMAE或捐助方計畫要求的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy EMAE's grid-connection requirements or donor-programme project specifications. Critical technical differences: (a) grid voltage — São Tomé is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; both are 50 Hz but voltage differs; PCS voltage protection thresholds, undervoltage/overvoltage ride-through parameters, and transformer tap settings must be reconfigured and verified for 230/400 V operation before commissioning; (b) isolated island grid dynamics — São Tomé's small isolated grid has significant frequency excursion characteristics; PCS must be capable of synthetic inertia or frequency-droop response as required by EMAE or the project specification; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — donor-programme project specifications are expected to require IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) communication protocols — confirm SCADA or telemetry interface required by EMAE for BESS dispatch and monitoring; (e) no publicly accessible EMAE grid-connection technical specification for BESS has been confirmed — direct EMAE engagement and donor-programme coordination are essential before equipment design is finalised.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足EMAE并网要求或捐助方项目规格。关键技术差异：（a）电网电压——圣多美为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；两者均为50 Hz但电压不同；PCS电压保护阈值、欠压/过压穿越参数及变压器分接头须在调试前重新配置并验证适用于230/400 V运行；（b）孤岛电网动态——圣多美小型孤立电网频率偏移特性显著；PCS须根据EMAE或项目规格要求具备综合惯量或调频下垂响应能力；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——捐助方项目规格预计要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2证据；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）通信协议——确认EMAE对BESS调度和监控所要求的SCADA或遥测接口；（e）尚未确认EMAE公开发布专门针对BESS的并网技术规格——在设备设计最终确定前，直接与EMAE接触并协调捐助方计划至关重要。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足EMAE併網要求或捐助方項目規格。關鍵技術差異：（a）電網電壓——聖多美為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；兩者均為50 Hz但電壓不同；PCS電壓保護閾值、欠壓/過壓穿越參數及變壓器分接頭須在調試前重新配置並驗證適用於230/400 V運行；（b）孤島電網動態——聖多美小型孤立電網頻率偏移特性顯著；PCS須根據EMAE或項目規格要求具備綜合慣量或調頻下垂響應能力；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——捐助方項目規格預計要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2證據；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）通訊協議——確認EMAE對BESS調度和監控所要求的SCADA或遙測接口；（e）尚未確認EMAE公開發布專門針對BESS的併網技術規格——在設備設計最終確定前，直接與EMAE接觸並協調捐助方計畫至關重要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMAE grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in São Tomé and Príncipe; no publicly confirmed written grid-connection technical specification for BESS as of dataset date — engage EMAE directly
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to São Tomé and Príncipe

source.publisher: EMAE — Empresa de Água e Electricidade (São Tomé and Príncipe sole electricity utility)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy EMAE's São Tomé and Príncipe grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for São Tomé's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid — note that voltage differs from China's 220/380 V despite both being 50 Hz. The isolated island grid has significant frequency instability; confirm PCS frequency-response capability with EMAE and the donor programme. No publicly accessible EMAE technical specification for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — engage EMAE and the relevant donor programme (World Bank, AfDB, or EU) at the earliest project stage before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足EMAE圣多美和普林西比并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对圣多美230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置——注意尽管两者均为50 Hz，但电压与中国220/380 V不同。孤立电网频率稳定性差；须向EMAE及捐助方计划确认储能变流器频率响应能力。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认EMAE公开发布BESS并网技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，须在项目最早阶段与EMAE及相关捐助方计划（世界银行、非洲开发银行或欧盟）接触。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足EMAE聖多美和普林西比併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對聖多美230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置——注意儘管兩者均為50 Hz，但電壓與中國220/380 V不同。孤立電網頻率穩定性差；須向EMAE及捐助方計畫確認儲能變流器頻率響應能力。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認EMAE公開發布BESS併網技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，須在項目最早階段與EMAE及相關捐助方計畫（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行或歐盟）接觸。
